layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips the market — patience is the smartest trade right now.
layman_explanation: The entire crypto market is in deep fear territory with Bitcoin hovering below $60,000 and most coins down 7-15% or more in the past week. The candidates that are up big (TAC +165%, VELVET +286%, GWEI +125%) have already made their move and are dangerously extended — chasing them now risks buying the top. The beaten-down coins (KITE, M/MemeCore) have strongly bearish charts with no reversal signals yet. Solana is the relative strongest major coin, barely down 2.5% this week, but lacks a clear catalyst or technical entry right now.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. Set price alerts for Solana around $68 and Bitcoin around $57,000. If we see a capitulation wick into those levels with a quick recovery, that's when to act. Don't chase coins that already pumped 100%+.
expert_reasoning: Fear & Greed at 12 and worsening signals we haven't reached capitulation bottom yet — typically the index needs to spike back up from a low to confirm a reversal. The parabolic movers (TAC, VELVET, GWEI) are near ATH and have no chart history to define reliable support — catching a knife on the way down from a 150-280% pump is extremely high risk. KITE and M both score -2.0 on chart bias with Three Black Crows patterns — these are actively falling knives with no reversal candle yet. WLD at -32% weekly with a Bearish Marubozu and only 0.99 R:R is unattractive. SOL is the cleanest setup on the watchlist but needs a deeper pullback to ~$68 to offer favorable risk/reward. In Extreme Fear environments, the best trades come from patience, not urgency.
risk_factors: Bitcoin breaking below $57K could trigger cascading liquidations and drag all alts down another 15-25%
U.S. jobs report this week could strengthen dollar and pressure risk assets further
CLARITY Act odds falling to 50% introduces regulatory uncertainty that may suppress institutional buying
watch_list: Bitcoin price action around $57,000 — a break below would signal deeper correction, a hold could form a base
Fear & Greed Index — watch for a reversal from 12 back above 20 as an early sign of capitulation bottom
U.S. June jobs report impact on dollar strength and risk appetite
market_context: Bitcoin hovering below $60K in extreme fear (12/100) with institutional ETF outflows reported. A pivotal week ahead with macro data and European MiCA regulatory deadline could drive the next major directional move.
context_banner: Extreme Fear at 12/100 with no reversal signals yet — capital preservation is the priority while waiting for a true capitulation setup.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 12 (Extreme Fear) and worsening from 18 yesterday — capitulation hasn't completed yet, suggesting more downside is possible before a tradeable bottom forms.
Bitcoin in 'technical no man's land' below $60K with major support levels far away — headline confirms there's no nearby floor to trade against.
Institutions dumped BTC and ETH ETFs, signaling professional money is de-risking — not the backdrop for aggressive long entries.
BTC price RSI printing a key 2026 signal — worth monitoring but not yet confirmed as a buy trigger.
ETH derivatives reset noted — could set up a cleaner long entry once the reset completes and funding normalizes.
